sections.description: Configuration package for lil-olt-metrics that handles loading and parsing of application settings from YAML files, environment variables, and sensible defaults.
sections.purpose: Provides centralized configuration management with a hierarchical Config struct that encompasses server settings, OTLP ingestion endpoints, Prometheus query API parameters, storage backend configuration, data retention policies, and OTLP-to-Prometheus translation rules. Enables runtime configuration via YAML files and environment variable overrides with LOM_ prefix.
strengths: Comprehensive configuration hierarchy covering all system components
Custom YAML unmarshalers for Duration (supporting days suffix) and ByteSize (supporting KB/MB/GB suffixes) enabling human-readable configuration
Three-tier precedence system: defaults > YAML file > environment variables
Extensive validation with clear error messages for invalid values and missing required fields
Reflection-based environment variable override system that recursively applies LOM_ prefixed overrides to nested struct fields
Support for multiple storage backends (filesystem, Prometheus remote write, VictoriaMetrics) with appropriate validation
Well-tested with 25+ test cases covering defaults, YAML loading, env overrides, type conversions, validation, and precedence rules
weaknesses: Limited validation for certain numeric bounds (e.g., max samples could have upper limits)
No support for loading from multiple config files or config directories
Config struct is quite large (11 nested types); could benefit from grouping related config sections
Maps and slices (LabelMap, Promote) skip environment variable overrides due to reflection limitations
sections.test_coverage: Comprehensive test coverage with 25 test cases: TestLoadDefaults, TestLoadYAMLOverride, TestLoadYAMLPreservesDefaults, TestEnvOverride, TestEnvOverrideDuration, TestEnvOverrideByteSize, TestEnvTakesPrecedenceOverYAML, TestValidateInvalidLogLevel, TestValidateInvalidLogFormat, TestValidateInvalidEngine, TestValidatePrometheusEngineRequiresURLs, TestValidateVictoriaMetricsEngineRequiresURLs, TestValidatePrometheusEngineWithURLsSucceeds, TestValidateInvalidPort, TestValidateNegativeMaxRecvMsgSize, TestLoadInvalidYAMLPath, TestParseDuration (4 subtests), TestParseByteSize (5 subtests), TestEnvOverrideBool. All tests use t.Parallel() and follow table-driven patterns where appropriate. Happy paths, edge cases, validation errors, and precedence rules are all tested.
dependencies: gopkg.in/yaml.v3 - YAML parsing library for unmarshaling config files
github.com/stretchr/testify - Test assertion library (assert, require packages) used in test suite
functionality: Load(path string) - Main entry point that loads configuration from defaults, optional YAML file, and environment variable overrides, then validates the result
newDefaults() - Creates Config struct with sensible defaults for all components
loadYAML(c *Config, path string) - Unmarshals YAML file into Config struct
applyEnvOverrides() - Recursively applies LOM_ prefixed environment variable overrides using reflection, with special handling for Duration and ByteSize types
validate() - Validates configuration values including log levels/formats, engine types, port numbers, required URLs for remote backends, positive constraints
Duration custom type - Wraps time.Duration with YAML unmarshaler supporting '15d' syntax in addition to standard Go duration format
ByteSize custom type - Wraps int64 with YAML unmarshaler supporting 'KB', 'MB', 'GB' suffixes in addition to raw bytes
Helper functions: parseDuration, parseByteSize, validateListen, setFieldFromString
files: config.go - Main configuration implementation with all types and logic (488 lines)
config_test.go - Comprehensive test suite with 25 test cases (296 lines)
